name: City Office REIT Inc. 6.625% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock
summary: City Office REIT Inc. is a real estate investment trust (REIT) focused on acquiring, owning, and operating high-quality office properties located primarily in metropolitan areas with strong economic fundamentals. The company seeks to generate attractive returns for its stockholders through rental income and property appreciation. City Office REIT is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
